old_message1:
Hack Club YSWs – quick look at what’s live and how much you earn per hour  

jackpot  
- status: active (ends 2026‑07‑07)  
- dollars per hour: $6 (official source)  
- IRL event: canceled – logistics and budget  
- no slack channel listed  

remixed  
- status: active (ends 2026‑04‑30 23:59:59)  
- dollars per hour: $3.13 (source provided)  
- also converts doohickeys at 0.25 $ per doohickey  
- IRL event: none  
- slack info: not available  

flavortown  
- status: active (ends 2026‑04‑30)  
- description: “Cook personal projects. Win free prizes.”  
- website: https://flavortown.hackclub.com/?ref=ysws-catalog  
- slack channel: #flavortown (https://hackclub.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C09MPB8NE8H)  
- dollars per hour: not available  
- converts doohickeys at 0.20 $ per doohickey  
- IRL event: none  

Sorted by dollars per hour (high to low): jackpot → remixed → flavortown (no rate).  

That’s the lineup. Pull the ones that match your hustle and get to work.
